title: microsorum powellii
intro: Microsorum powellii, also known as the New Zealand pepper fern or Powell's microsorum, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microsorum powellii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with conditions such as arthritis and allergies. In traditional Maori medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
